rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN C. OWENS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Respondent'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories To Petitioners C.M. Owens And M.K. Owens And For Sacntions.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Friday, August 18, 2006. Respondent John c. Owens's motion to compel further answers to special interrogatories: Granted in part and denied in part. #11: denied, the interrogatory is overbroad. #12: granted in part. Petitioners are ordered to respond by identifying any medical providers who are not identified in the medical records from Kaiser San Francisco. #13: denied, the interrogatory is overbroad. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. If either party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, notice must be given pursuant to Local Rule 8.3 with a hearing date of August 22, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NABEEH N. MOGANNAM

rulings.Rulings: Matter calendared for Friday, August 18, 2006. Hearing required. = (612/EAH)
